creator: mfs@libraria.pl
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #6)
I've decided to write about it here, because both happened at the same time and it may suggest more general problem with infrastructure (break in?) so there's some probability it can also be useful for solving problem with the forum. Problem is, there's no infrastructure mailing list (at least I couldn't find it), and technically it's not a question, so I'm not sure if it fits in freebsd-questions :) Thank you anyway.
